DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-analytics` owns common analytics concepts that can be realized through target-specific tabular or multidimensional models.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the empty MetaAnalytics workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare a base measure aggregate function.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a typed table attribute or calculated attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add object-level security for an attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare an attribute relationship inside a table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Expose an attribute in a perspective.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Expose a hierarchy in a perspective.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Expose a measure in a perspective.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Expose a table in a perspective.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a relationship between analytics tables.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add row-level security over a table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a member to a security role.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare one attribute as the sort key for another.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add object-level security for a table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta` is the core workspace CLI for creating, inspecting, editing, comparing, and maintaining modeled metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Bulk insert instances from tsv/csv input. Use --auto-id only for new rows whose source data does not carry an external Id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Generate numeric Id only for input rows that omit Id and are being created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Insert one instance by explicit Id or auto-generated numeric Id. Use --auto-id only when creating a brand-new row with no external identity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Generate next numeric Id from existing instances for a new row when no external Id exists.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Diff/merge instances and apply instance updates.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Inspect and edit model entities, properties, and relationships.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: View entity schema or one instance.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Deploy generated artifacts to external targets.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Input directory containing generated SQL scripts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Environment variable name that contains the target SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional database to create/use before deployment.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Export workspace data to external formats.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: C# only. Emit optional tooling helpers in <Model>.Tooling.cs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import from SQL into a new workspace, or import CSV into new/existing workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required for sql; optional for csv (mutually exclusive with --workspace).
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Use existing workspace for csv import.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Show workspace summary and model/instance sizes.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Rename the model contract and instance root element.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Atomically rename an entity, update relationship targets, and rename implied non-role relationship fields.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an entity (blocked if instances or inbound relationships exist).
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Backfill existing rows (required for required properties when entity already has rows).
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Change whether a property is required; use --default-value to backfill existing rows when making a property required.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Backfill existing missing/blank rows when switching to required; only valid with --required true.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Rename a property in one entity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop a property from an entity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Rename a relationship usage by setting or clearing its role; instance relationship field names are rewritten atomically.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Set a new relationship role (usage column becomes <Role>Id). Omit --role to clear the role and revert usage naming to <TargetEntity>Id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a required relationship; use --default-id to backfill existing source instances.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required when source entity already has rows; must exist in target entity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Atomically convert a scalar source property to a required relationship using a target lookup key. Source property is dropped by default; use --preserve-property only when the source property name will not collide with the implied relationship usage name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required source scalar property to rewrite.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required lookup key property on target entity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Keep the source scalar property. This is only valid when the source property name does not collide with the implied relationship usage name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Atomically convert a required relationship back to a required scalar Id property.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required source entity that owns the relationship.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required target entity referenced by the relationship.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional relationship role when multiple edges target the same entity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop a declared relationship (blocked if in use).
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Read-only relationship inference from model + instance data. Strong suggestions require one exact eligible Id-based target; weak suggestions cover role-style suffix matches and other ambiguous multi-target cases.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Print copy/paste refactor commands for eligible relationship suggestions.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-convert` performs explicit cross-model conversions between supported Meta-BI workspaces, carrying structure from one modeled surface into another.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaSchema workspace to MetaRawDataVault workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the MetaRawDataVault workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional source field name to ignore. May be repeated.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional source field suffix to ignore. May be repeated.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaRawDataVault workspace to MetaSql workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Source workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaBusinessDataVault workspace to MetaSql workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Source workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert promoted MetaDataQuality candidates to SQL DQ views.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. MetaDataQuality workspace to convert. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Output workspace or script folder path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaDataWarehouse workspace to MetaSql workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Source workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaTransformScript SQL modules to MetaSql workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Source MetaTransformScript workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaSql SQL modules to MetaTransformScript workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Source MetaSql workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert view modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert function modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert stored procedure modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create an empty MetaTransformScript workspace when selected module kinds have no convertible modules.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaAnalytics workspace to MetaTabular workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. MetaAnalytics workspace to convert. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Output workspace or script folder path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Convert MetaAnalytics workspace to MetaMultiDimensional workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. MetaAnalytics workspace to convert. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Output workspace or script folder path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-data-quality` derives reviewable MetaDataQuality candidates directly from typed MetaTransformScript structure and optional binding evidence. The checks are model-derived, not hand-authored one-off test SQL.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Derive reviewable DQ candidates from modeled MetaTransformScript structure.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the generated MetaDataQuality workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. MetaTransformBinding workspace used to scan only validated scripts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Review the generated DQ pack and optional adjustments.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Show up to n candidate cases. Implies --show-cases. Default: 20.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Include candidate ids in adjustment output. Implies --show-cases.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Promote generated DQ candidates for SQL output.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Promote one generated candidate. May be provided more than once.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-data-type` bootstraps sanctioned MetaDataType workspaces that define the data-type vocabulary used across Meta-BI models and conversions.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the sanctioned workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body:
Purpose: - bootstrap sanctioned `MetaDataType` workspaces
Command surface: - `meta-data-type help` - `meta-data-type --new-workspace <path>`
Example:
```cmd meta-data-type --new-workspace .\MetaDataType.Workspace ```
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Examples

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-data-type-conversion` authors and validates sanctioned conversion graphs between data types, including resolution from a source type through modeled conversion rules.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the sanctioned workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Resolve one source data type id through the sanctioned mappings.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source data type id to resolve.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional target system when the source type has mappings to several target systems.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-datavault-business` creates sanctioned business Data Vault workspaces for modeling business-oriented vault structures.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the empty MetaBusinessDataVault workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business hub to an ordered bridge path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business link to an ordered bridge path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a hierarchical link satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business hub key part.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business hub satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a participating hub to a standard business link.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business link satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a hub-satellite reference to a point-in-time table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a link-satellite reference to a point-in-time table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business point-in-time stamp column.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business reference key part.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business reference satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a same-as link satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Precision datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Scale datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-datavault-raw` creates sanctioned raw Data Vault workspaces for modeling source-oriented Data Vault structures.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the empty MetaRawDataVault workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a raw hub key part.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a raw hub satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a participating hub to a raw link.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a raw link satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a source field datatype detail.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a source table relationship field.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-data-warehouse` models logical dimensional warehouse concepts, separating warehouse intent from SQL Server realization and deployment mechanics.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the empty MetaDataWarehouse workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Mark a fact as an accumulating snapshot.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a lifecycle milestone to an accumulating snapshot.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare an aggregate fact derived from a source fact.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a dimension participant to a bridge.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a bridge weighting measure with a Meta data type.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a degenerate dimension value to a fact.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a dimension attribute with a Meta data type.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add an ordered attribute to a dimension business key.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Connect a fact to a bridge table.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a dimensional role to a fact.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add an attribute component to a junk dimension.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Mark a fact as a periodic snapshot.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare SCD behavior for a dimension.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare a Type 1 attribute in an SCD dimension.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Declare a Type 2 attribute in an SCD dimension.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-docs` turns CLI definitions, workspace models, selected instance facts, and authored narrative into refreshable reference documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an authored documentation page in a MetaDocs workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Page title and subject display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional authored documentation source display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import a structured CLI definition into a MetaDocs workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Assembly that exposes a public static CliAppDefinition factory method.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Fully qualified type name containing the factory method.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Public static factory method name. Default: CreateAppDefinition.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional rendered group name, for example meta-bi.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import command-oriented markdown prose into existing CLI documentation subjects.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace that already contains imported CLI subjects.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Markdown file or directory to scan for command prose.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional stable documentation source id for imported markdown prose.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import generic model documentation from a Meta workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source Meta workspace whose model should be documented.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional root subject ordering number. Default: 100.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import selected workspace instance documentation from a modeled opt-in policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional root subject ordering number. Default: 200.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in entity policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source workspace entity name to include.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in property policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Property name to import as a generated fact.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in relationship policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Merge multiple MetaDocs workspaces into a suite workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Suite workspace to create or replace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Validate a MetaDocs workspace lifecycle and reference integrity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Treat warnings as failing diagnostics.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Render one merged metametabi docs page from a MetaDocs workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-multi-dimensional` creates sanctioned MetaMultiDimensional workspaces for modeling multidimensional analytics artifacts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the empty MetaMultiDimensional workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create modeled objects on an Analysis Services multidimensional instance.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaMultiDimensional workspace to deploy. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Promote a processed multidimensional database through backup and restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Target database name to restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop a multidimensional database from an Analysis Services multidimensional instance.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-orchestration` infers the safe run graph and run plan from modeled pipeline tasks and binding-derived access profiles, recording policy issues when safe ordering cannot be proven.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: List analyzer issues recorded in an orchestration workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Explain one analyzer issue and its participating pipelines.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Issue id or unique issue code.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Record an explicit success or failure dependency between tasks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Whether the successor follows predecessor success or failure.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Record an explicit success dependency/order resolution in an orchestration workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Allow concurrent execution for multiple Append effects on one object.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Data object whose append writers can overlap.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Record scoped lock compatibility for one object/effect interaction.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Data object whose effect interaction is being resolved.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Left write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Right write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Lock behavior for the object/effect pair.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional reason recorded with the policy row.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Refresh the model-inferred, lock-aware run-plan rows in an orchestration workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Inspect the model-inferred task dependency graph.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute the current run plan by coordinating meta-pipeline worker processes.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaOrchestration workspace containing the analysis and run-plan rows.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaPipeline workspace used by child pipeline workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used by child pipeline workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used by child pipeline workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional conversion policy workspace passed to child workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional operational DB connection env passed to child workers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Maximum concurrently granted pipeline tasks. Default: 1.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional operational root for run journals, worker logs, and workspace execution leases.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional timeout for silent worker protocol periods. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional startup/activation timeout. Omitted follows --worker-event-timeout-seconds; 0 disables activation timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional timeout while waiting for child workers to connect to the named pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-pipeline` creates sanctioned MetaPipeline workspaces that describe transform steps and pipeline structure as explicit metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute a modeled pipeline's serial task chain.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaPipeline workspace that contains the modeled serial task chain.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used by transform tasks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used by transform tasks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute a modeled pipeline under an orchestration worker protocol.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaPipeline workspace that contains the modeled serial task chain.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Pipeline name to execute as a worker.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used by transform tasks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used by transform tasks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Named pipe used for orchestration worker control messages.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional timeout while connecting to the orchestration control pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute one modeled transform-backed pipeline step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaPipeline workspace that contains the modeled step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Pipeline name containing the step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Pipeline task name or id to execute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used by the step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used by the step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute the direct SQL Server runtime slice.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformScript workspace containing the script.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace containing script binding rows.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. TransformScript.Name or TransformScript.Id to execute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Shell-visible environment variable for the execution SQL Server connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required for SELECT-kind scripts. Shell-visible environment variable for the target SQL Server connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Bounded in-memory row buffer size. Default: 1000.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no command timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Runtime target type family for InsertRows. Default: SqlServer.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional conversion policy workspace; omitted uses the built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional shell-visible environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create or update the MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Shell-visible environment variable with a SQL Server connection string that can create the database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Prune old MetaPipeline operational diagnostic logs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Shell-visible environment variable for the initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Delete eligible diagnostic rows older than this retention window.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Report eligible rows without deleting them.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add one Pipeline instance to a MetaPipeline workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add one transform-backed step to a pipeline.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Pipeline that receives the new serial step.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. TransformScript.Name or TransformScript.Id to model.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformScript workspace used for script selection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaTransformBinding workspace used for binding selection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Shell-visible environment variable named by the modeled execution connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the script name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required for SELECT-kind scripts. Shell-visible environment variable named by the modeled target connection.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: SELECT-kind target write model. The only supported value is insert-rows.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Bounded in-memory row buffer size for InsertRows. Default: 1000.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds for the transform execution. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: InsertRows target type family. Default: SqlServer.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Show a compact MetaPipeline workspace summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-schema` extracts live SQL Server schema structure into sanctioned MetaSchema workspaces, making database objects available as explicit metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Materialize sanctioned MetaSchema workspaces from external sources.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - extract a sanctioned `MetaSchema` workspace from a live SQL Server schema
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Guidance

DocumentationNarrative.Body:
Purpose: - extract a sanctioned `MetaSchema` workspace from a live SQL Server schema
Command surface: - `meta-schema help` - `meta-schema extract sqlserver --new-workspace <path> --connection-env <name> --system <name> (--schema <name> | --all-schemas) (--table <name> | --all-tables)`
Example:
`--connection-env` names the shell-visible environment variable that contains the SQL Server connection string.
```cmd meta-schema extract sqlserver --new-workspace .\MetaSchema.Workspace --connection-env META_SQL_DEV --system MySystem --schema dbo --all-tables ```
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Examples

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-sql` plans and applies manifest-driven SQL Server deployments from sanctioned MetaSql workspaces.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Materialize sanctioned MetaSql workspaces from external sources.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create a deploy manifest (add/alter/block/replace; destructive actions require exact object-scoped approvals).
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source MetaSql workspace to compare with the live database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the deploy manifest workspace will be written.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Approve one exact destructive table drop.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Approve one exact destructive column drop.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Approve one exact destructive column truncation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional JSON file containing destructive approvals.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Apply a deploy manifest after source/live fingerprint validation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Deploy manifest workspace created by deploy-plan.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source MetaSql workspace used to create the manifest.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute a SQL Server file or query for demo/bootstrap/verification scripts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute SQL from a file. Mutually exclusive with --query.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Execute inline SQL. Mutually exclusive with --file.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Replace one SQLCMD-style $(NAME) token before execution. Can be repeated.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Command timeout for each SQL batch. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-tabular` creates sanctioned MetaTabular workspaces for modeling tabular analytics artifacts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the empty MetaTabular workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Create modeled objects on an Analysis Services tabular instance.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaTabular workspace to deploy. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Promote a processed tabular database through backup and restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Target database name to restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop an existing target database before restore.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Drop a tabular database from an Analysis Services tabular instance.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.

DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-transform-binding` binds MetaTransformScript workspaces to explicit source and target schema contracts, producing rowset, column, and validation evidence.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Bind all transform scripts and validate against source/target schema contracts into a new workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Execution context for one/two-part source identifiers.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the binding workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required when any one-part source identifier exists.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional comma-separated target columns to exclude from target conformance checks.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional comma-separated target columns to exclude only on target tables where they exist.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional sanctioned conversion policy workspace. Omitted uses built-in defaults.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Save only objects that bind and validate successfully; skipped objects are failures.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional TSV report for objects skipped due to binding or validation failure. Requires --allow-partial.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body:
- bind all transform scripts in a transform workspace into an explicit binding workspace (`rowsets`, `columns`, source/target SQL identifiers) - validate source and target contracts against explicit schema workspaces in the same command - fail hard on contract mismatches and persist explicit validation link rows in the resulting workspace
- `bind` reads the target SQL identifier from view/mutation transform metadata; inline TVF and scalar function definitions are targetless helper scripts - scalar function definitions materialize as binding rows without rowsets or targets, while scalar function call sites inside views/statements still bind their argument expressions and same-workspace scalar-function return-expression body sources - source identifiers resolve against source schema workspaces; target identifiers resolve against the target schema workspace - source identifier resolution is explicit: - `system.schema.table` resolves directly - `schema.table` resolves as `<execute-system>.<schema>.<table>` - `table` resolves as `<execute-system>.<execute-system-default-schema-name>.<table>` - `--execute-system` is required and must be represented in provided source schema workspaces when one/two-part source identifiers exist - if any one-part source identifier exists, `--execute-system-default-schema-name` is required - each source/target schema workspace must contain exactly one system - `bind` enforces target write-contract shape using non-identity target fields - `bind` processes all transform scripts in the transform workspace - `--ignore-target-columns` excludes named non-identity target columns from target conformance checks; unknown names fail explicitly - `--ignore-target-columns-if-present` excludes named non-identity target columns only on target tables where they exist - `--data-type-conversion-workspace` selects the sanctioned conversion policy workspace used for type compatibility checks; omitted uses the built-in defaults - source-to-target data type conformance is checked as exact or sanctioned conversion path, not hardcoded widening logic - bind is atomic: if binding or validation fails, no output workspace is created - `--allow-partial` is an explicit corpus/discovery mode; it saves only scripts that bind and validate successfully, and `--partial-report` can write skipped object diagnostics as TSV
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Guidance

DocumentationNarrative.Body:
```cmd meta-transform-binding bind --transform-workspace .\TransformWS --source-schema .\SourceSchemaWS --target-schema .\TargetSchemaWS --execute-system WarehouseDb --new-workspace .\BindingWS
meta-transform-binding bind --transform-workspace .\TransformWS --source-schema .\SalesSchemaWS --source-schema .\ReferenceSchemaWS --target-schema .\WarehouseSchemaWS --execute-system WarehouseDb --execute-system-default-schema-name dbo --new-workspace .\BindingWS --ignore-target-columns LoadUtc,RunId --ignore-target-columns-if-present UpdateAudit_ID --data-type-conversion-workspace .\MetaDataTypeConversion.Workspace
meta-transform-binding bind --transform-workspace .\TransformWS --source-schema .\SourceSchemaWS --target-schema .\TargetSchemaWS --execute-system WarehouseDb --execute-system-default-schema-name dbo --new-workspace .\BindingWS --allow-partial --partial-report .\binding-partial.tsv ```
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Examples

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - `--execute-system` is required and must be represented in provided source schema workspaces when one/two-part source identifiers exist - if any one-part source identifier exists, `--execute-system-default-schema-name` is required
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Usage

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - if any one-part source identifier exists, `--execute-system-default-schema-name` is required
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Usage

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - `--ignore-target-columns` excludes named non-identity target columns from target conformance checks; unknown names fail explicitly - `--ignore-target-columns-if-present` excludes named non-identity target columns only on target tables where they exist
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Usage

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - `--ignore-target-columns-if-present` excludes named non-identity target columns only on target tables where they exist
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Usage

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - `--data-type-conversion-workspace` selects the sanctioned conversion policy workspace used for type compatibility checks; omitted uses the built-in defaults
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Usage

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - `--allow-partial` is an explicit corpus/discovery mode; it saves only scripts that bind and validate successfully, and `--partial-report` can write skipped object diagnostics as TSV
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Usage

DocumentationNarrative.Body: - `--allow-partial` is an explicit corpus/discovery mode; it saves only scripts that bind and validate successfully, and `--partial-report` can write skipped object diagnostics as TSV
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Usage

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-transform-script` models a bounded SQL transform surface as semantically round-trippable workspace data, preserving transform intent through import, emit, and diff cycles.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import SQL file/code into a new or existing workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Emit SQL files or SQL code from a MetaTransformScript workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: View, add, and remove stored procedure contracts.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-weave` creates MetaWeave workspaces for explicit model-to-model weaving, where structure is carried across modeled surfaces instead of hidden in ad hoc conversion code.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Empty target directory for the new MetaWeave workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Local model alias used by bindings.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a property binding between two model references.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Suggest missing property bindings only when the source values resolve uniquely and completely in a target key.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Validate property bindings across referenced workspaces.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Materialize a new workspace from a valid weave.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. MetaWeave workspace to materialize from.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Empty target directory for the materialized workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary
